prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen4 2.0 TSI (CZPA)** engine, targeting 380 HP and 480 Nm with a **Garrett GT2867R turbocharger**, **APR high-pressure fuel pump**, and **Morrison Motorsports 3.5-inch downpipe** with a **Milltek Sport 76mm cat-back exhaust** (resonated for daily drivability).

KW Suspensions **Clubsport coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 40mm drop) with **H&R 25mm spacers** (front) and **20mm spacers** (rear) to correct wheel offset, paired with **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** and **SuperPro poly bushings** (full subframe and control arm refresh).

Brembo **GT 6-piston front calipers** (380mm discs) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, **Brembo 4-piston rear calipers** (350mm discs), and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**, fed by a **Motul RBF660 brake fluid** flush (boiling point >320°C).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny VW-01 widebody kit** (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** (OEM+ finish) and **Vorsteiner V-FF107 21-inch forged wheels** (9.5J ET35 front, 11J ET40 rear) in **Gunmetal with polished lips**.

**Maxton Design M-Sport front bumper** (with integrated **Seibon carbon fiber hood** and **Vland LED adaptive headlights**), **custom rear spoiler** (3D-printed ABS, 120mm height) with **Griot’s Garage Ceramic Coating** for UV protection, and **debadged grille** (replaced with **Volkswagen R-Line emblem**).

**Interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats** (heated/ventilated, Alcantara with **Nappa leather bolsters**), **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (380mm, suede with **VW R-Line stitching**), **Alcantara headliner** (custom-fitted by **Eurotrim**), and **AEM X-Series digital dash** (replacing the stock cluster, with **custom CAN bus integration** for boost/fuel pressure).
